title: dolichos trilobus subsp. transvaalicus
intro: Dolichos trilobus subsp. transvaalicus, also known as the African horned cucumber, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, characterized by its unique horn-like growths on its stem. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Dolichos trilobus subsp. transvaalicus include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
